gameplay_job: make safety, danger, and restored territory readable without text
positive_prompt: third-person and top-down VFX reference frames of a sacred golden circle expanding across violet-black corruption, warm round sanctuary, dawn-blue inner safety, gold radial pulse, pale stone arena floor, clean boundary, readable combat space, bravery expands the light, stylized UE5 gameplay VFX reference, no text
negative_prompt: opaque smoke, particle wall, messy bloom, unreadable floor, horror gore, excessive sparks covering enemies, text, words, watermark, logo, frame
review_gate: expansion must be obvious in one second and must not obscure enemies or player
